# rh-ssg-legal-and-support

Red Hat SSG review for legal and support: no cost/pricing references, no
future-release promises, and correct Developer Preview / Technology Preview
requirements and admonitions. Checklist-driven, no CLI arguments; composed by
`docs-review-style`. Takes precedence over `ibm-sg-legal-information` for
Red Hat content.

**Plugin**: [docs-skills](index.md) | **:material-check: User-invocable**

## Usage

```bash
Check this Red Hat doc for TP/DP admonitions and support-scope language
```
